query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_rows,
  SUM(CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as sum_total_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as installment_paid,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 1 THEN CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE 0 END) as device_sale,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_bad_debt_row = 0 THEN CAST(total_amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) ELSE CAST(bad_debt AS DECIMAL(18,2)) END) as total_paid_new,
  SUM(CAST(overpaid AS DECIMAL(18,2))) as sum_overpaid
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
